name: campus-recruiting-finder
description: Find, verify, deduplicate, and summarize campus recruiting opportunities for new graduates.

interface.longDescription: Finds and organizes new graduate campus recruiting information from company career sites, university employment boards, and current web search results. It helps verify deadlines, locations, eligibility, source links, and follow-up actions.
defaultPrompt: 帮我搜集互联网/AI方向的2026届校招岗位
按城市整理最近仍可投递的校招信息
核验这些公司的应届生招聘入口和截止日期
